input.command: mkdir -p /_outputs/parliament_task_output && for p in 1 2 3 4 5; do tvly extract "https://www.parliament.lk/en/members-of-parliament/mp-listing?page=$p" --json | jq -r '.results[0].raw_content' | grep -o 'https://www.parliament.lk/en/members-of-parliament/mp-profile/[0-9]\+' >> /_outputs/parliament_task_output/all_urls_raw.txt; sleep 1; done; sed -n '1,200p' /_outputs/parliament_task_output/all_urls_raw.txt

output:
exit_code=2
mkdir: cannot create directory ‘/_outputs’: Permission denied
sed: can't read /_outputs/parliament_task_output/all_urls_raw.txt: No such file or directory
